name: alorbach-ai-model-relay
description: Windows tray companion for Alorbach AI Gateway that exposes a secure localhost relay for local and API-backed AI model drivers, formerly named Codex Local Bridge.

scripts.test: node test/security.test.js && node test/job-manager.test.js && node test/diagnostics.test.js && node test/backend-registry.test.js && node test/codex-runner.test.js && node test/codex-prompt.test.js && node test/image-attachments.test.js && node test/asr.test.js && node test/server-jobs.test.js && node test/relay-routes.test.js && node test/transcribe.test.js && node test/multimodal.test.js

author: Andre Lorbach
